notes: Extended cases for moving even nodes to the back while preserving relative order.

cases.name: sample_move_evens_to_back
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list after moving even integers to the back of the linked list is: 3 7 15 2 4 18

cases.name: all_odd_values_remain_in_place
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list after moving even integers to the back of the linked list is: 1 3 5 7

cases.name: all_even_values_remain_in_place
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list after moving even integers to the back of the linked list is: 2 4 6 8

cases.name: head_even_moves_behind_all_odds
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list after moving even integers to the back of the linked list is: 1 3 5 8 2
